name: sonovafurn Modular Compression Sofa
short_description: A modular compressed sofa with sculpted volume, boxed delivery, and a layout built for small-space living.
description: Designed for apartments and modern family rooms, this modular compression sofa expands into a lounge-focused silhouette with deep seats, soft edges, and premium everyday comfort.
feature_bullets: Vacuum-compressed sofa in a box for easier delivery
Modular silhouette made for small apartments and media rooms
Soft-touch boucle texture with deep lounge seating

faq.a: No tools are required. Unbox, remove the wrap, and let the modules expand into shape.

faq.q: Is it good for small apartments?
faq.a: Yes. The boxed format is designed for tighter entries, elevators, and upstairs rooms.

faq.q: Can I clean the fabric easily?
faq.a: Spot-clean with a soft cloth and mild upholstery-safe cleanser.
Yes. The foam is engineered to recover shape after transit and setup.

Soft boucle texture and flexible seating layout

name: sonovafurn Ribbed Floor Lounger

description: Designed for compact rooms and calm interiors, this floor lounger pairs a supportive foam core with wide corduroy texture and a relaxed seat angle that works especially well near shelving, windows, or quiet lounge zones.
feature_bullets: Low lounge silhouette for flexible small-space placement
Soft ribbed corduroy texture with supportive foam comfort
Easy to style in reading corners and guest spaces

faq.a: No assembly is required. It is designed to be placed and used right away.
Yes. Its lower profile and smaller footprint work well in apartments, studios, and bedrooms.

faq.q: How should the corduroy be cleaned?
faq.a: Use a soft brush or upholstery-safe vacuum attachment for routine care and spot-clean gently when needed.

name: sonovafurn Reading Lounge Chair
durability: Reading, lounging, and occasional guest use
short_description: A reading lounge chair with a warm rust corduroy finish, relaxed foam volume, and an easy library-corner presence.
description: This lounge chair is shaped for slower moments: reading, quiet coffee breaks, and softer evening use. Its low foam body and warm corduroy texture bring a more lived-in tone to modern apartments without losing the clean silhouette.
feature_bullets: Warm rust color for editorial apartment styling
Foam comfort shaped for reading and casual lounging
Works naturally with side tables, shelving, and window light

faq.q: Is the chair firm or soft?
faq.a: It balances soft surface comfort with enough internal support for upright reading use.

faq.q: Does the rust color work in neutral rooms?
faq.a: Yes. It is designed to act as a warmer accent inside beige, cream, wood, and white interiors.
Yes. It is lighter than a standard armchair and easier to reposition inside smaller rooms.

name: sonovafurn Grand Modular Sectional
durability: Large-format family lounging and daily living
short_description: A grand modular sectional with oversized proportions, creamy boucle texture, and a bright architectural room presence.
description: For customers who want the softness of a premium modular silhouette without a visually heavy result, this sectional combines rounded forms, warm daylight compatibility, and deeper lounge seating suited to open-plan living rooms.

Soft ivory boucle that keeps larger seating visually light
Deep supportive seating for everyday comfort and hosting
highlights: Low visual weight for large rooms

faq.a: It is large, but the low silhouette and soft ivory finish help it feel lighter than many traditional sectionals.

faq.q: Is it good for daily family use?
faq.a: Yes. It is designed for repeated lounging, hosting, and regular living room use.

faq.q: Does the fabric look premium in natural light?
faq.a: Yes. The boucle texture is especially suited to bright rooms and soft daylight.

name: sonovafurn Cream Swivel Lounge Chair
durability: Bedroom, lounge, and accent seating use

feature_bullets: Rounded cocoon seat shape with premium softness
Subtle swivel base for flexible room positioning
Warm cream finish suited to quieter evening interiors

faq.a: It is designed with a smooth swivel base for flexible everyday positioning.

faq.q: Is it good for bedrooms or only living rooms?
faq.a: It works well in both, especially in corners, reading spaces, and bedroom seating zones.

faq.q: How does the cream fabric hold up?
faq.a: Routine care and prompt spot cleaning help maintain the softer light finish over time.
